    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbstractColumn
    Base abstract class for fixed-width file columns.
    CharColumn
    Left-aligned, space-padded character column.
    DateColumn
    Date column supporting custom formatting and null-padding.
    DateTimeColumn
    DateTime column supporting custom formatting and null-padding.
    DetailRowDescriptor
    Detail row descriptor.
    FileDescriptor
    Descriptor representing the layout structure of a Fixed Width File.
    FooterRowDescriptor
    Footer row descriptor.
    HeaderRowDescriptor
    Header row descriptor.
    PositiveDecimalColumn
    Positive decimal column with fixed decimal places and leading zeros.
    PositiveIntegerColumn
    Positive integer column with leading zeros.
    Reader
    Reader for fixed-width file content into structured maps.
    RenderUtils
    Render utility to export file descriptors into Markdown, ReStructuredText (RST), and HTML format.
    RightCharColumn
    Right-aligned, space-padded character column.
    RowDescriptor
    Descriptor for a row consisting of multiple ordered columns.
    TimeColumn
    Time column supporting custom formatting and null-padding.
